metric: v7.1 tiering non-inferiority: a true-SI case must resolve to T2. Regression set = {true-SI EN : s3 fired AND no s1} that would drop to T1.
corpus: CRADLE Bench eval.jsonl (crisis-tier labels: active_suicide_ideation, passive_suicide_ideation, self_harm)

per_language.ar: UNMEASURED — no Arabic CRADLE corpus exists

note: AR routing is provably unchanged by tiering (s3_ar_az + s3_failclosed); AR recall is a separate pre-existing gap (Gate 1, S2/MARBERT).
